title: Cronos Group Inc. (CRON) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos Group Q2 2024 earnings call transcript on Seeking Alpha. The company reported record quarterly net revenue of $27.8 million, up 46% year-over-year. Gross profit of $6.3 million, up 103% from Q2 2023. Gross margin improved from 16% to 23%. Adjusted EBITDA improved by $4.9 million year-over-year. Cash position of $848 million. Company provided $51 million credit facility to Cronos GrowCo for cultivation facility expansion. Management highlighted Spinach brand becoming number one flower brand in Canada. The company noted growth trajectory expected to accelerate once GrowCo expansion capacity comes online in late 2025. Strategic focus includes maintaining brand leadership, expanding international operations, and leveraging cultivation capacity for cost advantage.
